criticalIssues: No Organization schema (employer not linked in structured data)
No EducationalOrganization schema (universities mentioned in content but not marked up)
Name disambiguation relies on sameAs links alone — no location/affiliation schema to distinguish from namesake
nameCompetitor: Viktor Petrovich Ivanov (KGB officer, Putin ally, sanctioned by US Treasury)

searchVisibility.victorIvanovSoftwareEngineer: Top 3 via ZoomInfo/LinkedIn (not the actual site)

improvementHistory.change: Added robots.txt and sitemap.xml via Next.js App Router conventions (app/robots.ts, app/sitemap.ts)
improvementHistory.details: robots.txt allows all crawlers, blocks /api/, references sitemap. Sitemap lists homepage (priority 1.0, weekly) and resume PDF (priority 0.5, monthly).

improvementHistory.change: Metadata overhaul in app/layout.tsx — added metadataBase, canonical URL, Open Graph, Twitter Card, keyword-rich title and description
improvementHistory.details: Set metadataBase to https://victorivanov.engineer enabling relative URLs. Added canonical '/' to prevent duplicate content with Vercel deployment URL. Added full Open Graph tags (title, description, url, siteName, locale, type) and Twitter Card (summary). Updated title to 'Victor Ivanov | Software Engineer' and description to keyword-rich copy.
issuesResolved: No metadataBase in Next.js metadata config
No canonical URL (duplicate content risk with Vercel URL)
No Open Graph metadata (social sharing broken)
Generic description: 'Software engineer portfolio -- projects, skills, and experience.'

improvementHistory.change: Added JSON-LD structured data (Person + WebSite schemas) via app/components/JsonLd.tsx
improvementHistory.details: Person schema includes name, url, jobTitle, and sameAs links (GitHub, LinkedIn, X). WebSite schema includes site name and url. Both rendered as <script type="application/ld+json"> in the document body.

improvementHistory.change: Added OG and Twitter images via Next.js ImageResponse API, upgraded Twitter card to summary_large_image
improvementHistory.details: Created app/opengraph-image.tsx and app/twitter-image.tsx generating 1200x630 PNG images with name, title, and tech stack. Both include proper alt text. Updated Twitter card type from 'summary' to 'summary_large_image'. Full SEO re-audit updated all category scores to reflect verified implementation state.
issuesResolved: No images with alt text on entire site
